scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names controller,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm exec --workspace @stackpilot/controller -- tsx watch src/server.ts" "npm exec --workspace @stackpilot/web -- vite"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @stackpilot/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @stackpilot/host-telemetry && npm run typecheck --workspace @stackpilot/controller && npm run typecheck --workspace @stackpilot/agent && npm run typecheck --workspace @stackpilot/cert-helper && npm run typecheck --workspace @stackpilot/database-helper && npm run typecheck --workspace @stackpilot/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && eslint tests scripts deploy/scripts eslint.config.js
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @stackpilot/contracts && npm run test --workspace @stackpilot/config && npm run test --workspace @stackpilot/controller && npm run test --workspace @stackpilot/web && npm run test --workspace @stackpilot/agent && npm run test --workspace @stackpilot/cert-helper && npm run test --workspace @stackpilot/database-helper && node --test tests/architecture/boundaries.test.js
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/config && npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/contracts && npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/host-telemetry && npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/agent && npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/cert-helper && npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/database-helper && npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/controller && npm run build --workspace @stackpilot/web
